# Elinor

> A research initiative working with impact-focused wealth managers to reimagine how capital is collected, allocated, and evaluated — for better returns to investors and society.

Elinor researches how impact-focused wealth managers can rethink the way capital flows from investors into the world: how it is raised, how it is allocated across strategies and managers, and how outcomes are evaluated.

## Website

- Main site: https://elinorai.com

## Focus

- How impact-focused wealth managers collect capital from their clients
- How that capital is allocated across managers, strategies, and ventures
- How returns — financial and social — are measured and evaluated

## Audience

Impact-focused wealth managers, family offices, foundations, and asset allocators seeking better outcomes for investors and for society.

## Contact

Email hello@elinorai.com
